content.problemStatement:
Let's define ScoreScoreScore of an array BBB of length MMM as тИСi=1MтИСj=iMf(i,j)\sum_{i=1}^{M} \sum_{j=i}^{M} f(i,j)тИСi=1MтАЛтИСj=iMтАЛf(i,j), where f(i,j)=Bif(i,j) = B_if(i,j)=BiтАЛ тИг|тИг Bi+1B_{i+1}Bi+1тАЛ тИг|тИг тАж\dotsтАж тИг|тИг BjB_jBjтАЛ (Here тИг|тИг denotes the bitwise OR operation)

You are given an array AAA, consisting of NNN **distinct** elements.

Find the sum of ScoreScoreScore over all N!N!N! possible permutations of AAA.

Since the answer can be large, output it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT - the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN - the length of the array.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated **distinct** integers A1,A2,тАж,AnA_1,A_2, \dots ,A_nA1тАЛ,A2тАЛ,тАж,AnтАЛ representing the array AAA.


Output Format
For each test case, output the sum obtained modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: Sum of NNN does not exceed 5тЛЕ1055 \cdot 10^55тЛЕ105 over all testcases
